raw.subject: Your Jacksonville page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I couldn't help but notice your enthusiasm for the Carolina Home and Garden Market on your page. It's great to see you're preparing for a big event with your delicious gluten-free Sourdough Focaccias and experiments like Jalapeño Cheddar and Cheddar Bacon.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on potential bookings and calls from people looking for your gluten-free and keto baked goods.

I sketched out a simple page idea that brings together your Facebook photos and posts into a cohesive online presence. It includes a menu hero section showcasing your specials, an hours block so customers know when to visit, and a photo gallery to give them a taste of your baked goods. I even added a map & directions section to make it easy for them to find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/breezes-delight-jacksonville

Building this out is a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in getting started, just reply or give me a quick call to discuss the details.
